allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(''SquareStack:'', !!l.SquareStack\); console.log\(''PackageMinus:'', !!l.PackageMinus\); console.log\(''Egg:'', !!l.Egg\); console.log\(''Sparkles:'', !!l.Sparkles\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(''SquareStack:'', Boolean\(l.SquareStack\)\); console.log\(''PackageMinus:'', Boolean\(l.PackageMinus\)\); console.log\(''Egg:'', Boolean\(l.Egg\)\); console.log\(''Sparkles:'', Boolean\(l.Sparkles\)\);")
